alias.description: Human-readable name for your SMTP server

authType.description: <x-lifecycle-container><x-lifecycle class="ea"></x-lifecycle> <x-lifecycle class="oie"></x-lifecycle></x-lifecycle-container>The authentication type that's used by your SMTP server

enabled.description: If `true`, all email traffic is routed through your SMTP server

host.description: Hostname or IP address of your SMTP server

port.description: Port number of your SMTP server

username.description: Username that's used to access your SMTP server
